areas.name: hermes-integration
areas.summary: 16 items remain flagged per safety rails (touch lib/hermes**). H-03 docstring fixed iter2 (commit 5212da2).

areas.name: kanban
areas.summary: Prod verified: 7 unique API calls (vs 18 dev), TTFB 48ms, no StrictMode duplication, no SSE storm.

areas.name: calendar
areas.summary: H1 dedupe FIXED iter1 (commit 0cd3be2). H2 unpaginated Scan in orphan cleanup remains FLAGGED — touches Hermes sync/destructive path.

areas.name: chat
areas.summary: Both CRITICAL (CR-01 /api/chats no auth, CR-02 /api/chat/approve no session check) RESOLVED by middleware iter2 (commit 0a2cecb). 7 WARNING items remain as quality improvements.

areas.name: terminal
areas.summary: CR-01 (anonymous /api/terminal/execute) RESOLVED by middleware iter2. CR-02 (allow-list only validates first token) remains FLAGGED as defense-in-depth — exploitability now requires basic-auth creds. parseInt radix fixed iter2 (commit 5212da2).

areas.name: agents
areas.summary: CR-01 (no auth on mutations) RESOLVED by middleware iter2. CR-02 (seed?force=1 wipes user edits) FIXED iter2 (commit 5212da2). WR-05 (String(err) leak) FIXED iter2.

areas.name: memory
areas.summary: CR-01 (no auth) RESOLVED by middleware iter2. CR-02 (unpaginated Scan + filter-after-limit) remains FLAGGED — touches DDB schema. WR-02 dynamic-import FIXED iter1 (commit 0cd3be2). WR-06 animation cascade FIXED iter2. parseInt radix fixed iter2.

areas.name: auth
areas.summary: Middleware re-enabled with HTTP Basic Auth gate iter2 (commit 0a2cecb). Verified end-to-end via curl: anonymous=401, correct creds=200, wrong creds=401, hermes webhook bypass works. MC_USERNAME+MC_PASSWORD now required for any deployment.

areas.name: dashboard
areas.summary: Renders, TTFB 511ms (within budget), 11 API calls (5 unique x 2 StrictMode in dev), no console errors.

areas.name: perf-cross-cutting
areas.summary: All prod TTFB 6-52ms (budget 800ms). All bundles under 300KB First Load JS. /memory -47KB win confirmed. StrictMode 4x confirmed dev-only. SSE storm fix holding.

flagged_items_remaining: terminal/CR-02: allow-list only validates first token (defense-in-depth, gated by basic auth)
memory/CR-02: unpaginated Scan with filter-after-limit silently drops rows
calendar/H2: unpaginated Scan in orphan-cleanup deletes valid rows once table > 1MB

hermes-integration: 15 remaining items in lib/hermes** (H-01 directOnly swallow, H-02/M-01 cache invalidation drift, M-02 chatSend 401 fallback, M-03 SSE [DONE] loop, M-04 build-time warmup storm, M-06 sync 30s spinner, L-01..L-08 minor)
BUILD: next@14.2.5 critical security advisory (major upgrade out of scope)
fixes_shipped_iter2: feat(auth): HTTP Basic Auth middleware (commit 0a2cecb) — closes 5/6 CRITICAL
